transcript.text:
I had 100 prawns earlier today
And came to Gunsan
[So let's just have 10 servings]
[Tteokgalbi (Grilled Short Rib Patties)]
[Charcoal grilled]
[Smoky Flavor]
[Ta-da]
[Feasting]
She ordered more!!!
[Incredible]
[10 servings of Tteokgalbi mukbang starting now!]
Hello everyone
I had 100 prawns earlier today
And came down to Gunsan
There are 2 famous Tteokgalbi restaurants here
I'm here at 1 of them

Their tteokgalbi looks really unique
It's very wide and flat With garlic on top?
Something about it brought me here
Here
It's been here for 30 years [Jin Galbi located in Jeollabuk-do, Gunsan-si]
I haven't been to restaurants that specialize in Tteokgalbi
I'm very curious to see how it would taste
[Chanting Tteokgalbi]
Hello
[Found a seat]
[They only have 2 items on their menu]
I wonder how many servings I need
I had a lot of prawns today
So let's just order 10 servings
Your jaw will hurt eating 10 servings...
I will also take the Oxtail Soup as well, please

[This is the famous]
[Gunsan Tteokgalbi]
[Grilled with charcoal]
[10 servings of Tteokgalbi]
[I hate vegetables]
[The sidedishes look delicious]
Haven't had acorn jelly in a while
I want to eat it as a whole
[Success!]
[Yum!]
[Here it comes]
Thank you
She's eating that by herself
Are you forreal?
I will eat it for real
Thank you

[What?]
[They ordered 4 servings]
[This couple ordered 2 servings]
They are babies
How many servings is that?
10 servings
It's because I had 100 prawns today
I've never seen tteokgalbi that looks like this
It's flattened out
Garlic on top
It looks really delicious
That looks good Thank you
[Oxtail Soup] It's hot, be careful
That looks... Wait no!
I have to eat the tteokgalbi before they get cold
Rip it like this

Tender
Looks good, right?
The meat juice just...
explodes
The meat is so tender too It's so juicy, really amazing
The texture is chewy
Yummy
This might not be enough
It's good
That smoky flavor
The smokiness is amazing
Delicious
[Thumb of truth]
There's meat on the bones too
These are ribs
Can't go wrong with short ribs

[Some oxtail soup too!]
It's filled with meat Let's try some soup first
[Emergency]
It's hot
My esophagus
Wait, that's good
This is it
This is close to something that's homecooked
It's done right
A strong black pepper taste
And the soup is really thick
The owner said this goes well with it (pickled mustard greens)
It really is better
That sourness catches out all the gamey taste
The flavor of the beef enhances even more(?)
[Correcting herself]

I can't even talk
Some chives this time
Pickled mustard leaves are the best
[Sleeve up]
Bones too
The bone is very thin
It's got more meat
Tteokgalbi goes well with rice, so
Cut out a huge piece
[Put it on top]
[1 bite of tteokgalbi]
[1 bite of rice]
[Found the real deal]
Finish it up with some soup
That's it
1 more time

Tteokgalbi on rice
Radish kimchi
That's too big
[And she proceeds to eat it in 1 bite]
Eating tteokgalbi, rice, and the side dishes,
Finishing it up with some soup
[It's the best]
I'll leave all the bones on 1 side and eat them all later
[Some white kimchi too]
So many fun ways to eat
I've tried them all, but nothing beats pickled mustard leaf
She's amazing
She's pretty too
That glossiness
It got cold, but it's still good
It's a tteokgalbi pizza

Pickled perilla leaf is similar to pickled mustard leaf,
But the mustard leaf is more refreshing
[Busy eating]
Mustard leaf is very similar to Siberian onion
This is a face mask for your skin
Really?
Thank you
[Re-heating the food for her]
Thank you
I've had skin troubles
Thank you
[Ordered some more soup] Thank you
It's a new bowl now
[Then let's get rid of it again]
Seasoned with salt Just how I like it
[Nice and warm]

Thank you
Some garlic on top
I can taste a lot
Almost like a beef patty
Or like marinated beef
Or tteokgalbi
They use Korean beef ribs and brisket
Not in a blender, but all prepared and minced by hand
Made with sincerity
It's not too sweet either, so I don't get sick of it
Excuse me, Some more rice, please
Rice? Yes
She ordered more rice!!!
[The kitchen is in shock]
So amazing Jjang!
[Another bite of tteokgalbi]

[And some rice]
That goes so well together
It's the best
With rice-thief-Kimchi too
Hello
These are digestive enzymes
It's okay
For you to digest well Thank you
[Thank you so much]
I've received enzyme supplements...
Thank you
I'm receiving everything but food today
[Re-heated soup]
[Taking another plate to re-heat] Thank you
You're prettier in person Is that so?
I'm searching you up and you're better in person Oh, thank you

Please include that in the video
It's hot but really tasty
I know Tzuyang~!
She's eating so much!
[Enjoy your meal]
There's no more left
I'll just eat the soup then
[More tteokgalbi come up]
Thank you Enjoy
You can see that it's all minced
How did they do all this by hand?
[That's why they're famous!]
I think all the customers here come from far away
Those that tried it and can't forget the taste
It's something you can't easily forget
I have an idea

Put some rice on top of tteokgalbi
And get another tteokgalbi
Galbi burger
I might've done it the wrong way
[Where did my rice go?]
You drank 1 bottle per plate
That's 7 Fanta bottles
Are you okay? Yes, I'm fine
[Is someone hiding?]
[No way]
I've been here for 10 years and this is a first
She's been here for 7 years and it's a first
[This is a first for all of us]
I don't have much experience eating at restaurants that specialize in Tteokgalbi
It was really good
They prepared and minced all the patties by hand

So it was quality that I was able to taste
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
